name: Classic Border
svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 210 297"><rect x="8" y="8" width="194" height="281" fill="none" stroke="#1976d2" stroke-width="1.5"/><rect x="11" y="11" width="188" height="275" fill="none" stroke="#1976d2" stroke-width="0.5"/></svg>

name: Double Line Border
svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 210 297"><rect x="6" y="6" width="198" height="285" fill="none" stroke="#1976d2" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="12" y="12" width="186" height="273" fill="none" stroke="#1976d2" stroke-width="0.8"/></svg>

name: Dashed Border
svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 210 297"><rect x="8" y="8" width="194" height="281" fill="none" stroke="#1976d2" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-dasharray="6,4"/></svg>

name: Thick Top & Bottom
svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 210 297"><line x1="8" y1="10" x2="202" y2="10" stroke="#1976d2" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="8" y1="287" x2="202" y2="287" stroke="#1976d2" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="8" y1="14" x2="202" y2="14" stroke="#1976d2" stroke-width="0.5"/><line x1="8" y1="283" x2="202" y2="283" stroke="#1976d2" stroke-width="0.5"/></svg>

name: Academic Header Line
svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 210 297"><line x1="8" y1="22" x2="202" y2="22" stroke="#1976d2" stroke-width="1.5"/><line x1="8" y1="25" x2="202" y2="25" stroke="#1976d2" stroke-width="0.4"/><line x1="30" y1="8" x2="30" y2="289" stroke="#1976d2" stroke-width="0.6"/></svg>

name: Minimalist Dot Border
svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 210 297"><rect x="8" y="8" width="194" height="281" fill="none" stroke="#1976d2" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-dasharray="1,5"/></svg>

name: Shadow Box
svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 210 297"><rect x="11" y="11" width="194" height="281" fill="rgba(25,118,210,0.08)"/><rect x="8" y="8" width="194" height="281" fill="none" stroke="#1976d2" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg>

name: Certificate Border
svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 210 297"><rect x="5" y="5" width="200" height="287" fill="none" stroke="#1976d2" stroke-width="2.5"/><rect x="9" y="9" width="192" height="279" fill="none" stroke="#1976d2" stroke-width="0.5"/><rect x="12" y="12" width="186" height="273" fill="none" stroke="#1976d2" stroke-width="1"/><g fill="#1976d2"><rect x="5" y="5" width="8" height="8"/><rect x="197" y="5" width="8" height="8"/><rect x="5" y="284" width="8" height="8"/><rect x="197" y="284" width="8" height="8"/></g></svg>

name: Legal Margin Line
svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 210 297"><line x1="35" y1="8" x2="35" y2="289" stroke="#e53935" stroke-width="1"/><line x1="8" y1="8" x2="202" y2="8" stroke="#1976d2" stroke-width="0.5"/></svg>

name: Notebook Header
svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 210 297"><rect x="0" y="0" width="210" height="28" fill="rgba(25,118,210,0.06)"/><line x1="0" y1="28" x2="210" y2="28" stroke="#1976d2" stroke-width="1.5"/><line x1="0" y1="30" x2="210" y2="30" stroke="#1976d2" stroke-width="0.4"/></svg>

name: Diamond Corner Accents
svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 210 297"><rect x="8" y="8" width="194" height="281" fill="none" stroke="#1976d2" stroke-width="0.8"/><g fill="#1976d2"><polygon points="8,4 12,8 8,12 4,8"/><polygon points="202,4 206,8 202,12 198,8"/><polygon points="8,285 12,289 8,293 4,289"/><polygon points="202,285 206,289 202,293 198,289"/></g></svg>
